## Title: Fix NAS message integrity check bypass logic to prevent false positives

### Summary
The NAS message integrity checking code contained an overly broad bypass mechanism (`NAS_CODE_TO_BE_MODIFIED`) that forced MAC validation to pass under certain conditions, causing false positives and missed error detection in the network simulator. This patch replaces the hardcoded bypass with a targeted approach that only allows integrity check bypass for specific initial NAS messages that are legitim
